## FrameEvent type

All available events for controls to subscribe to. - `open`<!-- -->: is triggered when the window or tab is opened by the user. - `redraw`<!-- -->: is triggered whenever a redraw is started. Widget groups can use this to update their size and position relative to any child widget changes. - `update`<!-- -->: is triggered every frame (as in frames per second) while the window or tab is open. Be careful with heavy usage. - `close`<!-- -->: is triggered when the window is closed by the user.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type FrameEvent = "open" | "redraw" | "update" | "close";
```
